mission.title: coredns: Reverse zones should be calculated for the full CIDR range
mission.description: Reverse zones should be calculated for the full CIDR range. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify coredns troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your coredns deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns -n coredns --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review coredns configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant coredns configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns
kubectl get configmap -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=coredns
```
When specifying a reverse DNS zone using CIDR notation the full range of zones are not calculated.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Reverse zones should be calculated for the full CIDR range
steps.description:
CoreDNS was updated to properly calculate reverse zones for the full CIDR range. When specifying a reverse DNS zone using CIDR notation, all zones within the range are now generated correctly (e.g., 61.129.10.in-addr.arpa, 62.129.10.in-addr.arpa, 63.129.10.in-addr.arpa for a /22 block).

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Confirm Reverse zones should be calculated for the full… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns -n coredns --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n coredns --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: CoreDNS fixed the reverse zone calculation to properly handle the full CIDR range. Previously, reverse zones were only generated for the first IP in a CIDR block. The fix ensures that all IPs within the CIDR range are covered by the generated reverse zone entries.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with coredns installed or the issue environment reproducible.
